02

Finding your way around

Use the tabs to switch floors. The 2nd Floor Hub is marked ★ on the West map; on the 4th Floor, look for Riverside (★), the Board Room (★) and the Entrance (■).

IT Pick-up · Tour · Onboarding · Lunch

Riverside (★, yellow) and the Board Room (★, purple) are on the West side near The Queens Walk. Reception is by the Entrance (■). Everything on Tuesday happens in Riverside.

Welcome Breakfast · The Hub

The 2/F Hub (★) sits by the central café, just past the Entrance (■). Areas here include Highgate, Archway, Camden, Brixton, Streatham and Wimbledon.

2nd Floor · East wing (reference)

East wing reference — areas include Hackney, Dalston, Stratford, Greenwich, Bermondsey, Peckham and Westminster.
